name: Frame0 MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Frame0 MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Frame0 wireframing and UI prototyping tool — creating wireframe components, managing frames and layouts, generating UI mockups from descriptions, accessing project assets, and integrating AI-driven UI design into agent-driven product design and prototyping workflows.
use_cases: Generating wireframe mockups from product requirements from design agents
Creating UI component layouts from specification documents from product agents
Automating repetitive wireframing tasks from productivity agents
Iterating on UI designs based on feedback from design iteration agents
Generating multiple design variations for review from exploration agents
Integrating wireframe creation into product planning from planning agents
not_for: High-fidelity visual design (Frame0 is wireframing, not polished UI design)
Teams using Figma, Sketch, or other design tools (Frame0-specific)
Code generation from designs (wireframes only, no code output)
best_when: A product or design agent needs to generate low-fidelity wireframe mockups from descriptions or requirements — Frame0 MCP enables AI-driven UI prototyping without manual design work.
avoid_when: You need high-fidelity designs, code generation, or use Figma/Sketch — this is specific to the Frame0 wireframing tool.

auth.notes: Frame0 API key required. Register at frame0.app for API access. Store API key as environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Frame0 free tier with limited projects and exports
pricing.paid_tiers: Frame0 Pro: paid subscription for unlimited projects
pricing.notes: Frame0 has a free tier. MCP server is free. Paid plans for advanced features and unlimited use.

known_agent_gotchas: Frame0 is a newer/smaller tool — ecosystem and API maturity less established than Figma
Wireframe quality depends on Frame0's component library — limited to available primitives
AI-generated wireframes may not match exact UI requirements without iterative refinement
Project sharing and collaboration features may be limited on free tier
Official MCP but Frame0 as a company/product may have limited longevity compared to Figma
Export formats may be limited — verify SVG/PNG/PDF export support for your workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Store key as environment variable. Design data sent to Frame0 cloud — review data retention policy for proprietary designs.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Design data in Frame0 cloud — review retention for proprietary work.
